title: Creatopico 7
description: Creatopico season 7 client modpack, wiсh is based around Create, and a bit of decoration + exploration
body:
Modpack for the season 7 of the Creatopico server. Its based on the Create mod, followed by many of its addons, such as: Dreams n desires, design n decor, crafts & additions and many more!

It is recommended to use on the Creatopico server, but due to it being based in RU community - the pack can be used in separation for singleplayer worlds.
